authors_text: Yihong Dong,Ying Peng,Muqiao Yang,Songtao Lu,Qingjiang Shi
title: Signal Transformer: Complex-valued Attention and Meta-Learning for Signal Recognition
title_zh: Signal Transformer：用于信号识别的复值注意力和元学习
abstract: Deep neural networks have been shown as a class of useful tools for addressing signal recognition issues in recent years, especially for identifying the nonlinear feature structures of signals. However, this power of most deep learning techniques heavily relies on an abundant amount of training data, so the performance of classic neural nets decreases sharply when the number of training data samples is small or unseen data are presented in the testing phase. This calls for an advanced strategy, i.e., model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML), which is able to capture the invariant representation of the data samples or signals. In this paper, inspired by the special structure of the signal, i.e., real and imaginary parts consisted in practical time-series signals, we propose a Complex-valued Attentional MEta Learner (CAMEL) for the problem of few-shot signal recognition by leveraging attention and meta-learning in the complex domain. To the best of our knowledge, this is also the first complex-valued MAML that can find the first-order stationary points of general nonconvex problems with theoretical convergence guarantees. Extensive experiments results showcase the superiority of the proposed CAMEL compared with the state-of-the-art methods.

abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络已被证明是解决信号识别问题的一类有用工具，尤其是识别信号的非线性特征结构。然而，大多数深度学习技术的这种能力很大程度上依赖于大量的训练数据，因此当训练数据样本数量较少或在测试阶段出现看不见的数据时，经典神经网络的性能会急剧下降。这需要一种先进的策略，即与模型无关的元学习（MAML），它能够捕获数据样本或信号的不变表示。在本文中，受信号的特殊结构（即实际时间序列信号中包含的实部和虚部）的启发，我们提出了一种复值注意力元学习器（CAMEL），通过利用复数域中的注意力和元学习来解决少镜头信号识别问题。据我们所知，这也是第一个能够在理论收敛保证下找到一般非凸问题的一阶驻点的复值 MAML。大量的实验结果展示了所提出的 CAMEL 与最先进的方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于复值注意力和元学习的信号识别方法CAMEL，用于解决小样本信号识别问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法依赖大量训练数据，在小样本或未见数据场景下性能下降，需借助元学习提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计复值注意力机制结合模型无关元学习（MAML），利用信号的实部与虚部特性，在复数域中实现特征提取与元学习优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，CAMEL在小样本信号识别任务中优于现有先进方法，且具有非凸问题的理论收敛保证。
AI.conclusion: 复值域元学习框架有效提升了信号识别在数据稀缺场景下的性能，为小样本学习提供了新思路。

title: Tackling the Background Bias in Sparse Object Detection via Cropped Windows
title_zh: 通过裁剪窗口解决稀疏对象检测中的背景偏差
abstract: Object detection on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is still a challenging task. The recordings are mostly sparse and contain only small objects. In this work, we propose a simple tiling method that improves the detection capability in the remote sensing case without modifying the model itself. By reducing the background bias and enabling the usage of higher image resolutions during training, our method can improve the performance of models substantially. The procedure was validated on three different data sets and outperformed similar approaches in performance and speed.
summary: Object detection on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is still a challenging task. The recordings are mostly sparse and contain only small objects. In this work, we propose a simple tiling method that improves the detection capability in the remote sensing case without modifying the model itself. By reducing the background bias and enabling the usage of higher image resolutions during training, our method can improve the performance of models substantially. The procedure was validated on three different data sets and outperformed similar approaches in performance and speed.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）上的物体检测仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。录音大多稀疏，仅包含小物体。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单的平铺方法，可以在不修改模型本身的情况下提高遥感情况下的检测能力。通过减少背景偏差并在训练期间使用更高的图像分辨率，我们的方法可以显着提高模型的性能。该程序在三个不同的数据集上进行了验证，并且在性能和速度方面优于类似的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单分块方法，通过裁剪窗口减少无人机遥感图像中稀疏物体检测的背景偏差，提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 无人机拍摄的遥感图像中目标物体稀疏且体积小，现有检测方法存在背景偏差问题，导致检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 采用分块裁剪策略，在训练阶段使用更高分辨率图像并减少背景干扰，无需修改原有模型结构。
AI.result: 方法在三个公开数据集上验证，相较同类方法在检测精度和推理速度方面均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该分块方法有效缓解了稀疏场景下的背景偏差问题，为无人机遥感目标检测提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Shi-Min Hu,Zheng-Ning Liu,Meng-Hao Guo,Jun-Xiong Cai,Jiahui Huang,Tai-Jiang Mu,Ralph R. Martin
title: Subdivision-Based Mesh Convolution Networks
title_zh: 基于细分的网格卷积网络
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made great breakthroughs in 2D computer vision. However, their irregular structure makes it hard to harness the potential of CNNs directly on meshes. A subdivision surface provides a hierarchical multi-resolution structure, in which each face in a closed 2-manifold triangle mesh is exactly adjacent to three faces. Motivated by these two observations, this paper presents SubdivNet, an innovative and versatile CNN framework for 3D triangle meshes with Loop subdivision sequence connectivity. Making an analogy between mesh faces and pixels in a 2D image allows us to present a mesh convolution operator to aggregate local features from nearby faces. By exploiting face neighborhoods, this convolution can support standard 2D convolutional network concepts, e.g. variable kernel size, stride, and dilation. Based on the multi-resolution hierarchy, we make use of pooling layers which uniformly merge four faces into one and an upsampling method which splits one face into four. Thereby, many popular 2D CNN architectures can be easily adapted to process 3D meshes. Meshes with arbitrary connectivity can be remeshed to have Loop subdivision sequence connectivity via self-parameterization, making SubdivNet a general approach. Extensive evaluation and various applications demonstrate SubdivNet's effectiveness and efficiency.

abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在 2D 计算机视觉领域取得了巨大突破。然而，它们的不规则结构使得很难直接在网格上发挥 CNN 的潜力。细分曲面提供了分层多分辨率结构，其中闭合 2 流形三角形网格中的每个面与三个面精确相邻。受这两个观察的启发，本文提出了 SubdivNet，这是一种创新且多功能的 CNN 框架，用于具有循环细分序列连接的 3D 三角形网格。通过在网格面和 2D 图像中的像素之间进行类比，我们可以提出网格卷积算子来聚合附近面的局部特征。通过利用人脸邻域，该卷积可以支持标准的 2D 卷积网络概念，例如可变的内核大小、步幅和膨胀。基于多分辨率层次结构，我们利用池化层将四个人脸统一合并为一个，并使用上采样方法将一个人脸分成四个。因此，许多流行的 2D CNN 架构可以轻松地适应处理 3D 网格。具有任意连接性的网格可以通过自参数化重新网格化以具有循环细分序列连接性，从而使 SubdivNet 成为一种通用方法。广泛的评估和各种应用证明了 SubdivNet 的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于细分的网格卷积网络（SubdivNet），用于处理3D三角网格的卷积神经网络框架。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）难以直接应用于不规则结构的3D网格，而细分曲面能提供多分辨率层次结构，为网格卷积操作提供了灵感。
AI.method: 通过将网格面片与2D图像像素类比，设计网格卷积算子聚合局部特征，并利用细分层次实现池化与上采样层，适配多种2D CNN架构；任意连通性网格可通过自参数化转换为Loop细分结构。
AI.result: 实验和应用验证了SubdivNet在3D网格处理中的有效性与高效性，展示了其对多种任务的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: SubdivNet通过细分序列连接性实现了通用的3D网格CNN框架，为2D CNN架构迁移至3D领域提供了新思路。

conclusion: SubdivNet通过细分序列连接性实现了通用的3D网格CNN框架，为2D CNN架构迁移至3D领域提供了新思路。
search_text: Subdivision-Based Mesh Convolution Networks 基于细分的网格卷积网络 Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made great breakthroughs in 2D computer vision. However, their irregular structure makes it hard to harness the potential of CNNs directly on meshes. A subdivision surface provides a hierarchical multi-resolution structure, in which each face in a closed 2-manifold triangle mesh is exactly adjacent to three faces. Motivated by these two observations, this paper presents SubdivNet, an innovative and versatile CNN framework for 3D triangle meshes with Loop subdivision sequence connectivity. Making an analogy between mesh faces and pixels in a 2D image allows us to present a mesh convolution operator to aggregate local features from nearby faces. By exploiting face neighborhoods, this convolution can support standard 2D convolutional network concepts, e.g. variable kernel size, stride, and dilation. Based on the multi-resolution hierarchy, we make use of pooling layers which uniformly merge four faces into one and an upsampling method which splits one face into four. Thereby, many popular 2D CNN architectures can be easily adapted to process 3D meshes. Meshes with arbitrary connectivity can be remeshed to have Loop subdivision sequence connectivity via self-parameterization, making SubdivNet a general approach. Extensive evaluation and various applications demonstrate SubdivNet's effectiveness and efficiency. 卷积神经网络（CNN）在 2D 计算机视觉领域取得了巨大突破。然而，它们的不规则结构使得很难直接在网格上发挥 CNN 的潜力。细分曲面提供了分层多分辨率结构，其中闭合 2 流形三角形网格中的每个面与三个面精确相邻。受这两个观察的启发，本文提出了 SubdivNet，这是一种创新且多功能的 CNN 框架，用于具有循环细分序列连接的 3D 三角形网格。通过在网格面和 2D 图像中的像素之间进行类比，我们可以提出网格卷积算子来聚合附近面的局部特征。通过利用人脸邻域，该卷积可以支持标准的 2D 卷积网络概念，例如可变的内核大小、步幅和膨胀。基于多分辨率层次结构，我们利用池化层将四个人脸统一合并为一个，并使用上采样方法将一个人脸分成四个。因此，许多流行的 2D CNN 架构可以轻松地适应处理 3D 网格。具有任意连接性的网格可以通过自参数化重新网格化以具有循环细分序列连接性，从而使 SubdivNet 成为一种通用方法。广泛的评估和各种应用证明了 SubdivNet 的有效性和效率。 本文提出了一种基于细分的网格卷积网络（SubdivNet），用于处理3D三角网格的卷积神经网络框架。 Shi-Min Hu,Zheng-Ning Liu,Meng-Hao Guo,Jun-Xiong Cai,Jiahui Huang,Tai-Jiang Mu,Ralph R. Martin cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

title: Privacy Preference Signals: Past, Present and Future
title_zh: 隐私偏好信号：过去、现在和未来
abstract: Privacy preference signals are digital representations of how users want their personal data to be processed. Such signals must be adopted by both the sender (users) and intended recipients (data processors). Adoption represents a coordination problem that remains unsolved despite efforts dating back to the 1990s. Browsers implemented standards like the Platform for Privacy Preferences (P3P) and Do Not Track (DNT), but vendors profiting from personal data faced few incentives to receive and respect the expressed wishes of data subjects. In the wake of recent privacy laws, a coalition of AdTech firms published the Transparency and Consent Framework (TCF), which defines an opt-in consent signal. This paper integrates post-GDPR developments into the wider history of privacy preference signals. Our main contribution is a high-frequency longitudinal study describing how TCF signal gained dominance as of February 2021. We explore which factors correlate with adoption at the website level. Both the number of third parties on a website and the presence of Google Ads are associated with higher adoption of TCF. Further, we show that vendors acted as early adopters of TCF 2.0 and provide two case-studies describing how Consent Management Providers shifted existing customers to TCF 2.0. We sketch ways forward for a pro-privacy signal.

abstract_zh: 隐私偏好信号是用户希望如何处理其个人数据的数字表示。此类信号必须被发送者（用户）和预期接收者（数据处理者）采用。尽管早在 20 世纪 90 年代就已经做出了努力，但收养仍然是一个尚未解决的协调问题。浏览器实施了隐私偏好平台 (P3P) 和禁止跟踪 (DNT) 等标准，但从个人数据中获利的供应商几乎没有动力接受和尊重数据主体所表达的意愿。在最近的隐私法出台后，广告技术公司联盟发布了透明度和同意框架 (TCF)，它定义了选择加入同意信号。本文将 GDPR 后的发展融入到更广泛的隐私偏好信号历史中。我们的主要贡献是一项高频纵向研究，描述了截至 2021 年 2 月 TCF 信号如何占据主导地位。我们探讨了哪些因素与网站级别的采用相关。网站上第三方的数量和 Google Ads 的存在都与 TCF 的较高采用率相关。此外，我们还表明供应商是 TCF 2.0 的早期采用者，并提供了两个案例研究来描述同意管理提供商如何将现有客户转移到 TCF 2.0。我们勾勒出支持隐私信号的前进方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究隐私偏好信号的发展历程，重点分析透明度与同意框架（TCF）在GDPR实施后的普及情况及影响因素。
AI.motivation: 尽管自1990年代起已有多种隐私信号标准，但数据处理方与用户间的协调问题仍未解决，需探索TCF等新框架的实际效果及推广动因。
AI.method: 通过高频纵向研究分析TCF普及趋势，结合网站层级因素（如第三方数量、Google广告存在）与案例研究，探讨同意管理提供商（CMP）的转型策略。
AI.result: TCF自2021年2月起主导市场，网站第三方数量及Google广告关联性与TCF采用率正相关；厂商率先采用TCF 2.0，CMP通过案例推动客户迁移。
AI.conclusion: TCF代表隐私信号的重要进展，但需进一步优化以解决现有协调难题，未来应推动更有效的隐私优先信号机制。

authors_text: Sasha Sheng,Amanpreet Singh,Vedanuj Goswami,Jose Alberto Lopez Magana,Wojciech Galuba,Devi Parikh,Douwe Kiela
title: Human-Adversarial Visual Question Answering
comment: 22 pages, 13 figures. First two authors contributed equally
comments: 22 pages, 13 figures. First two authors contributed equally
abstract: Performance on the most commonly used Visual Question Answering dataset (VQA v2) is starting to approach human accuracy. However, in interacting with state-of-the-art VQA models, it is clear that the problem is far from being solved. In order to stress test VQA models, we benchmark them against human-adversarial examples. Human subjects interact with a state-of-the-art VQA model, and for each image in the dataset, attempt to find a question where the model's predicted answer is incorrect. We find that a wide range of state-of-the-art models perform poorly when evaluated on these examples. We conduct an extensive analysis of the collected adversarial examples and provide guidance on future research directions. We hope that this Adversarial VQA (AdVQA) benchmark can help drive progress in the field and advance the state of the art.

abstract_zh: 最常用的视觉问答数据集 (VQA v2) 的性能开始接近人类准确性。然而，在与最先进的 VQA 模型交互时，很明显问题还远未得到解决。为了对 VQA 模型进行压力测试，我们将它们与人类对抗示例进行了基准测试。人类受试者与最先进的 VQA 模型进行交互，对于数据集中的每个图像，尝试找到模型预测答案不正确的问题。我们发现，在对这些示例进行评估时，许多最先进的模型表现不佳。我们对收集的对抗性示例进行广泛分析，并为未来的研究方向提供指导。我们希望这个对抗性 VQA (AdVQA) 基准能够帮助推动该领域的进步并推进最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过人类生成对抗性问题来评估视觉问答模型的性能，创建AdVQA基准以推动模型改进。
AI.motivation: 尽管VQA模型在标准数据集上接近人类水平，但实际交互中仍存在明显缺陷，需更严格的压力测试方法。
AI.method: 让人类参与者针对数据集中的每张图像生成使模型预测错误的问题，收集对抗性样本进行模型评估。
AI.result: 多数先进模型在对抗样本测试中表现显著下降，分析显示模型存在可被针对性攻击的弱点。
AI.conclusion: AdVQA基准为VQA领域提供了新的评估标准，有助于揭示模型缺陷并指导未来研究方向。

authors_text: Qihang Yu,Yingda Xia,Yutong Bai,Yongyi Lu,Alan Yuille,Wei Shen
title: Glance-and-Gaze Vision Transformer
comment: codes and models will be made available at https://github.com/yucornetto/GG-Transformer
comments: codes and models will be made available at https://github.com/yucornetto/GG-Transformer
abstract: Recently, there emerges a series of vision Transformers, which show superior performance with a more compact model size than conventional convolutional neural networks, thanks to the strong ability of Transformers to model long-range dependencies. However, the advantages of vision Transformers also come with a price: Self-attention, the core part of Transformer, has a quadratic complexity to the input sequence length. This leads to a dramatic increase of computation and memory cost with the increase of sequence length, thus introducing difficulties when applying Transformers to the vision tasks that require dense predictions based on high-resolution feature maps. In this paper, we propose a new vision Transformer, named Glance-and-Gaze Transformer (GG-Transformer), to address the aforementioned issues. It is motivated by the Glance and Gaze behavior of human beings when recognizing objects in natural scenes, with the ability to efficiently model both long-range dependencies and local context. In GG-Transformer, the Glance and Gaze behavior is realized by two parallel branches: The Glance branch is achieved by performing self-attention on the adaptively-dilated partitions of the input, which leads to a linear complexity while still enjoying a global receptive field; The Gaze branch is implemented by a simple depth-wise convolutional layer, which compensates local image context to the features obtained by the Glance mechanism. We empirically demonstrate our method achieves consistently superior performance over previous state-of-the-art Transformers on various vision tasks and benchmarks. The codes and models will be made available at https://github.com/yucornetto/GG-Transformer.

This leads to a dramatic increase of computation and memory cost with the increase of sequence length, thus introducing difficulties when applying Transformers to the vision tasks that require dense predictions based on high-resolution feature maps. In this paper, we propose a new vision Transformer, named Glance-and-Gaze Transformer (GG-Transformer), to address the aforementioned issues. It is motivated by the Glance and Gaze behavior of human beings when recognizing objects in natural scenes, with the ability to efficiently model both long-range dependencies and local context. In GG-Transformer, the Glance and Gaze behavior is realized by two parallel branches: The Glance branch is achieved by performing self-attention on the adaptively-dilated partitions of the input, which leads to a linear complexity while still enjoying a global receptive field; The Gaze branch is implemented by a simple depth-wise convolutional layer, which compensates local image context to the features obtained by the Glance mechanism. We empirically demonstrate our method achieves consistently superior performance over previous state-of-the-art Transformers on various vision tasks and benchmarks. The codes and models will be made available at https://github.com/yucornetto/GG-Transformer.
abstract_zh: 最近，出现了一系列视觉 Transformers，由于 Transformers 强大的远程依赖建模能力，它们表现出比传统卷积神经网络更紧凑的模型尺寸，表现出优越的性能。然而，视觉 Transformers 的优势也是有代价的：Transformer 的核心部分 Self-attention 对于输入序列长度具有二次复杂度。这导致计算和内存成本随着序列长度的增加而急剧增加，从而在将 Transformer 应用到需要基于高分辨率特征图的密集预测的视觉任务时带来困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的愿景 Transformer，名为 Glance-and-Gaze Transformer (GG-Transformer)，来解决上述问题。它的动机是人类在识别自然场景中的物体时的扫视和凝视行为，能够有效地建模远程依赖性和局部上下文。在 GG-Transformer 中，Glance 和 Gaze 行为是通过两个并行分支实现的：Glance 分支是通过对输入的自适应扩张分区执行自注意力来实现的，这会导致线性复杂度，同时仍然享有全局感受野； Gaze 分支由一个简单的深度卷积层实现，该层将局部图像上下文补偿为 Glance 机制获得的特征。我们凭经验证明，我们的方法在各种视觉任务和基准测试中始终优于以前最先进的 Transformer。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/yucornetto/GG-Transformer 上提供。

AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer虽性能优越，但自注意力机制的二次复杂度导致计算和内存成本随序列长度增加而急剧上升，难以应对需要高分辨率特征图的密集预测任务。
AI.method: 受人类观察场景时‘扫视’与‘凝视’行为启发，设计双分支结构：Glance分支通过自注意力作用于自适应扩张的输入分区，实现线性复杂度与全局感受野；Gaze分支通过深度可分离卷积补偿局部上下文信息。
AI.result: 在多个视觉任务和基准测试中，GG-Transformer一致优于现有最先进Transformer模型，且代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: GG-Transformer通过融合全局与局部建模能力，在保持线性复杂度的同时提升了视觉任务性能，为高效视觉Transformer设计提供了新思路。

title: Ukiyo-e Analysis and Creativity with Attribute and Geometry Annotation
title_zh: 带有属性和几何注释的浮世绘分析与创意
abstract: The study of Ukiyo-e, an important genre of pre-modern Japanese art, focuses on the object and style like other artwork researches. Such study has benefited from the renewed interest by the machine learning community in culturally important topics, leading to interdisciplinary works including collections of images, quantitative approaches, and machine learning-based creativities. They, however, have several drawbacks, and it remains challenging to integrate these works into a comprehensive view. To bridge this gap, we propose a holistic approach We first present a large-scale Ukiyo-e dataset with coherent semantic labels and geometric annotations, then show its value in a quantitative study of Ukiyo-e paintings' object using these labels and annotations. We further demonstrate the machine learning methods could help style study through soft color decomposition of Ukiyo-e, and finally provides joint insights into object and style by composing sketches and colors using colorization. Dataset available at https://github.com/rois-codh/arc-ukiyoe-faces

abstract_zh: 浮世绘作为日本前现代艺术的一个重要流派，与其他艺术品研究一样，其研究重点是对象和风格。此类研究受益于机器学习社区对重要文化主题的重新兴趣，催生了包括图像收集、定量方法和基于机器学习的创造力在内的跨学科工作。然而，它们有几个缺点，将这些作品整合到一个全面的视图中仍然具有挑战性。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种整体方法。我们首先提出一个具有连贯语义标签和几何注释的大规模浮世绘数据集，然后展示其在使用这些标签和注释对浮世绘绘画对象进行定量研究中的价值。我们进一步证明机器学习方法可以通过浮世绘的软颜色分解来帮助风格研究，并最终通过使用着色来构成草图和颜色来提供对对象和风格的联合见解。数据集可在 https://github.com/rois-codh/arc-ukiyoe-faces 获取

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合属性和几何标注的浮世绘分析方法，并通过机器学习技术探索其对象与风格的创造性研究。
AI.motivation: 现有浮世绘研究缺乏统一的数据集和综合分析框架，难以整合图像收集、量化分析与机器学习创造力等跨学科成果。
AI.method: 构建包含语义标签和几何标注的浮世绘数据集，通过量化分析对象特征，利用软色彩分解研究风格，并结合素描与色彩化技术融合对象与风格分析。
AI.result: 发布了大规模浮世绘数据集，实现了对象量化分析与风格软色彩分解，通过色彩化技术提供了对象与风格的联合洞察。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和方法为浮世绘的跨学科研究提供了新视角，展示了机器学习在文化遗产分析中的潜力。

authors_text: Soroosh Shahtalebi,Jean-Christophe Gagnon-Audet,Touraj Laleh,Mojtaba Faramarzi,Kartik Ahuja,Irina Rish
title: SAND-mask: An Enhanced Gradient Masking Strategy for the Discovery of Invariances in Domain Generalization
title_zh: SAND-mask：用于发现域泛化中不变性的增强梯度掩蔽策略
abstract: A major bottleneck in the real-world applications of machine learning models is their failure in generalizing to unseen domains whose data distribution is not i.i.d to the training domains. This failure often stems from learning non-generalizable features in the training domains that are spuriously correlated with the label of data. To address this shortcoming, there has been a growing surge of interest in learning good explanations that are hard to vary, which is studied under the notion of Out-of-Distribution (OOD) Generalization. The search for good explanations that are \textit{invariant} across different domains can be seen as finding local (global) minimas in the loss landscape that hold true across all of the training domains. In this paper, we propose a masking strategy, which determines a continuous weight based on the agreement of gradients that flow in each edge of network, in order to control the amount of update received by the edge in each step of optimization. Particularly, our proposed technique referred to as "Smoothed-AND (SAND)-masking", not only validates the agreement in the direction of gradients but also promotes the agreement among their magnitudes to further ensure the discovery of invariances across training domains. SAND-mask is validated over the Domainbed benchmark for domain generalization and significantly improves the state-of-the-art accuracy on the Colored MNIST dataset while providing competitive results on other domain generalization datasets.

abstract_zh: 机器学习模型在现实世界应用中的一个主要瓶颈是它们无法推广到看不见的领域，这些领域的数据分布对于训练领域来说不是独立同分布的。这种失败通常源于在训练领域中学习与数据标签虚假相关的不可概括的特征。为了解决这个缺点，人们对学习难以改变的良好解释的兴趣日益浓厚，这是在分布外（OOD）泛化的概念下进行研究的。寻找跨不同领域 \textit{invariant} 的良好解释可以被视为在损失景观中寻找在所有训练领域都适用的局部（全局）最小值。在本文中，我们提出了一种掩蔽策略，该策略根据网络每个边缘流动的梯度一致性来确定连续权重，以控制每一步优化中边缘接收的更新量。特别是，我们提出的称为“平滑与（SAND）掩蔽”的技术，不仅验证了梯度方向的一致性，而且还促进了它们的幅度之间的一致性，以进一步确保发现跨训练域的不变性。 SAND-mask 在 Domainbed 领域泛化基准上进行了验证，显着提高了 Colored MNIST 数据集上最先进的准确性，同时在其他领域泛化数据集上提供了有竞争力的结果。

search_text: SAND-mask: An Enhanced Gradient Masking Strategy for the Discovery of Invariances in Domain Generalization SAND-mask：用于发现域泛化中不变性的增强梯度掩蔽策略 A major bottleneck in the real-world applications of machine learning models is their failure in generalizing to unseen domains whose data distribution is not i.i.d to the training domains. This failure often stems from learning non-generalizable features in the training domains that are spuriously correlated with the label of data. To address this shortcoming, there has been a growing surge of interest in learning good explanations that are hard to vary, which is studied under the notion of Out-of-Distribution (OOD) Generalization. The search for good explanations that are \textit{invariant} across different domains can be seen as finding local (global) minimas in the loss landscape that hold true across all of the training domains. In this paper, we propose a masking strategy, which determines a continuous weight based on the agreement of gradients that flow in each edge of network, in order to control the amount of update received by the edge in each step of optimization. Particularly, our proposed technique referred to as "Smoothed-AND (SAND)-masking", not only validates the agreement in the direction of gradients but also promotes the agreement among their magnitudes to further ensure the discovery of invariances across training domains. SAND-mask is validated over the Domainbed benchmark for domain generalization and significantly improves the state-of-the-art accuracy on the Colored MNIST dataset while providing competitive results on other domain generalization datasets. 机器学习模型在现实世界应用中的一个主要瓶颈是它们无法推广到看不见的领域，这些领域的数据分布对于训练领域来说不是独立同分布的。这种失败通常源于在训练领域中学习与数据标签虚假相关的不可概括的特征。为了解决这个缺点，人们对学习难以改变的良好解释的兴趣日益浓厚，这是在分布外（OOD）泛化的概念下进行研究的。寻找跨不同领域 \textit{invariant} 的良好解释可以被视为在损失景观中寻找在所有训练领域都适用的局部（全局）最小值。在本文中，我们提出了一种掩蔽策略，该策略根据网络每个边缘流动的梯度一致性来确定连续权重，以控制每一步优化中边缘接收的更新量。特别是，我们提出的称为“平滑与（SAND）掩蔽”的技术，不仅验证了梯度方向的一致性，而且还促进了它们的幅度之间的一致性，以进一步确保发现跨训练域的不变性。 SAND-mask 在 Domainbed 领域泛化基准上进行了验证，显着提高了 Colored MNIST 数据集上最先进的准确性，同时在其他领域泛化数据集上提供了有竞争力的结果。 本文提出一种名为SAND-mask的梯度掩码策略，通过增强梯度一致性来提升领域泛化能力，发现跨领域的不变性特征。 Soroosh Shahtalebi,Jean-Christophe Gagnon-Audet,Touraj Laleh,Mojtaba Faramarzi,Kartik Ahuja,Irina Rish cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Regularization and Reparameterization Avoid Vanishing Gradients in Sigmoid-Type Networks
title_zh: 正则化和重新参数化避免 Sigmoid 类型网络中的梯度消失
abstract: Deep learning requires several design choices, such as the nodes' activation functions and the widths, types, and arrangements of the layers. One consideration when making these choices is the vanishing-gradient problem, which is the phenomenon of algorithms getting stuck at suboptimal points due to small gradients. In this paper, we revisit the vanishing-gradient problem in the context of sigmoid-type activation. We use mathematical arguments to highlight two different sources of the phenomenon, namely large individual parameters and effects across layers, and to illustrate two simple remedies, namely regularization and rescaling. We then demonstrate the effectiveness of the two remedies in practice. In view of the vanishing-gradient problem being a main reason why tanh and other sigmoid-type activation has become much less popular than relu-type activation, our results bring sigmoid-type activation back to the table.
summary: Deep learning requires several design choices, such as the nodes' activation functions and the widths, types, and arrangements of the layers. One consideration when making these choices is the vanishing-gradient problem, which is the phenomenon of algorithms getting stuck at suboptimal points due to small gradients. In this paper, we revisit the vanishing-gradient problem in the context of sigmoid-type activation. We use mathematical arguments to highlight two different sources of the phenomenon, namely large individual parameters and effects across layers, and to illustrate two simple remedies, namely regularization and rescaling. We then demonstrate the effectiveness of the two remedies in practice. In view of the vanishing-gradient problem being a main reason why tanh and other sigmoid-type activation has become much less popular than relu-type activation, our results bring sigmoid-type activation back to the table.
abstract_zh: 深度学习需要多种设计选择，例如节点的激活函数以及层的宽度、类型和排列。做出这些选择时要考虑的一个因素是梯度消失问题，这是算法由于小梯度而陷入次优点的现象。在本文中，我们重新审视 sigmoid 型激活背景下的梯度消失问题。我们使用数学论证来强调这种现象的两个不同来源，即大的单个参数和跨层的影响，并说明两种简单的补救措施，即正则化和重新缩放。然后我们在实践中证明这两种补救措施的有效性。鉴于梯度消失问题是 tanh 和其他 sigmoid 型激活比 relu 型激活更不受欢迎的主要原因，我们的结果将 sigmoid 型激活带回了桌面。

title: Exploring Adversarial Learning for Deep Semi-Supervised Facial Action Unit Recognition
title_zh: 探索深度半监督面部动作单元识别的对抗性学习
abstract: Current works formulate facial action unit (AU) recognition as a supervised learning problem, requiring fully AU-labeled facial images during training. It is challenging if not impossible to provide AU annotations for large numbers of facial images. Fortunately, AUs appear on all facial images, whether manually labeled or not, satisfy the underlying anatomic mechanisms and human behavioral habits. In this paper, we propose a deep semi-supervised framework for facial action unit recognition from partially AU-labeled facial images. Specifically, the proposed deep semi-supervised AU recognition approach consists of a deep recognition network and a discriminator D. The deep recognition network R learns facial representations from large-scale facial images and AU classifiers from limited ground truth AU labels. The discriminator D is introduced to enforce statistical similarity between the AU distribution inherent in ground truth AU labels and the distribution of the predicted AU labels from labeled and unlabeled facial images. The deep recognition network aims to minimize recognition loss from the labeled facial images, to faithfully represent inherent AU distribution for both labeled and unlabeled facial images, and to confuse the discriminator. During training, the deep recognition network R and the discriminator D are optimized alternately. Thus, the inherent AU distributions caused by underlying anatomic mechanisms are leveraged to construct better feature representations and AU classifiers from partially AU-labeled data during training. Experiments on two benchmark databases demonstrate that the proposed approach successfully captures AU distributions through adversarial learning and outperforms state-of-the-art AU recognition work.

abstract_zh: 目前的工作将面部动作单元（AU）识别制定为监督学习问题，在训练过程中需要完全 AU 标记的面部图像。为大量面部图像提供 AU 注释即使不是不可能，也是具有挑战性的。幸运的是，AU 出现在所有面部图像上，无论是否手动标记，都满足潜在的解剖机制和人类行为习惯。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度半监督框架，用于从部分 AU 标记的面部图像中识别面部动作单元。具体来说，所提出的深度半监督AU识别方法由深度识别网络和鉴别器D组成。深度识别网络R从大规模面部图像中学习面部表征，并从有限的真实AU标签中学习AU分类器。引入鉴别器 D 是为了增强真实 AU 标签固有的 AU 分布与来自标记和未标记面部图像的预测 AU 标签的分布之间的统计相似性。深度识别网络旨在最大限度地减少标记面部图像的识别损失，忠实地表示标记和未标记面部图像的固有 AU 分布，并迷惑鉴别器。在训练过程中，深度识别网络R和判别器D交替优化。因此，在训练期间，利用底层解剖机制引起的固有 AU 分布，从部分 AU 标记的数据构建更好的特征表示和 AU 分类器。在两个基准数据库上进行的实验表明，所提出的方法通过对抗性学习成功捕获了 AU 分布，并且优于最先进的 AU 识别工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗学习的深度半监督框架，用于从部分标注的面部图像中进行面部动作单元（AU）识别。
AI.motivation: 传统AU识别依赖完全标注的数据，但获取大量标注数据成本高昂。面部动作单元在所有图像中均存在，可通过解剖机制和人类行为规律建模，因此需利用半监督方法挖掘未标注数据的价值。
AI.method: 框架包含深度识别网络R和判别器D。网络R从大规模图像中学习特征表示，并利用有限标注数据训练AU分类器；判别器D通过对抗训练使预测的AU分布与真实分布趋近。两者交替优化以提升特征表示和分类性能。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上验证，该方法通过对抗学习有效捕捉AU分布，优于现有最先进的AU识别方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用对抗学习建模AU的内在分布规律，可有效提升半监督场景下AU识别性能，为减少标注依赖提供新思路。

search_text: Exploring Adversarial Learning for Deep Semi-Supervised Facial Action Unit Recognition 探索深度半监督面部动作单元识别的对抗性学习 Current works formulate facial action unit (AU) recognition as a supervised learning problem, requiring fully AU-labeled facial images during training. It is challenging if not impossible to provide AU annotations for large numbers of facial images. Fortunately, AUs appear on all facial images, whether manually labeled or not, satisfy the underlying anatomic mechanisms and human behavioral habits. In this paper, we propose a deep semi-supervised framework for facial action unit recognition from partially AU-labeled facial images. Specifically, the proposed deep semi-supervised AU recognition approach consists of a deep recognition network and a discriminator D. The deep recognition network R learns facial representations from large-scale facial images and AU classifiers from limited ground truth AU labels. The discriminator D is introduced to enforce statistical similarity between the AU distribution inherent in ground truth AU labels and the distribution of the predicted AU labels from labeled and unlabeled facial images. The deep recognition network aims to minimize recognition loss from the labeled facial images, to faithfully represent inherent AU distribution for both labeled and unlabeled facial images, and to confuse the discriminator. During training, the deep recognition network R and the discriminator D are optimized alternately. Thus, the inherent AU distributions caused by underlying anatomic mechanisms are leveraged to construct better feature representations and AU classifiers from partially AU-labeled data during training. Experiments on two benchmark databases demonstrate that the proposed approach successfully captures AU distributions through adversarial learning and outperforms state-of-the-art AU recognition work. 目前的工作将面部动作单元（AU）识别制定为监督学习问题，在训练过程中需要完全 AU 标记的面部图像。为大量面部图像提供 AU 注释即使不是不可能，也是具有挑战性的。幸运的是，AU 出现在所有面部图像上，无论是否手动标记，都满足潜在的解剖机制和人类行为习惯。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度半监督框架，用于从部分 AU 标记的面部图像中识别面部动作单元。具体来说，所提出的深度半监督AU识别方法由深度识别网络和鉴别器D组成。深度识别网络R从大规模面部图像中学习面部表征，并从有限的真实AU标签中学习AU分类器。引入鉴别器 D 是为了增强真实 AU 标签固有的 AU 分布与来自标记和未标记面部图像的预测 AU 标签的分布之间的统计相似性。深度识别网络旨在最大限度地减少标记面部图像的识别损失，忠实地表示标记和未标记面部图像的固有 AU 分布，并迷惑鉴别器。在训练过程中，深度识别网络R和判别器D交替优化。因此，在训练期间，利用底层解剖机制引起的固有 AU 分布，从部分 AU 标记的数据构建更好的特征表示和 AU 分类器。在两个基准数据库上进行的实验表明，所提出的方法通过对抗性学习成功捕获了 AU 分布，并且优于最先进的 AU 识别工作。 本文提出一种基于对抗学习的深度半监督框架，用于从部分标注的面部图像中进行面部动作单元（AU）识别。 Shangfei Wang,Yanan Chang,Guozhu Peng,Bowen Pan cs.CV

title: Visual Question Rewriting for Increasing Response Rate
title_zh: 视觉问题重写以提高响应率
abstract: When a human asks questions online, or when a conversational virtual agent asks human questions, questions triggering emotions or with details might more likely to get responses or answers. we explore how to automatically rewrite natural language questions to improve the response rate from people. In particular, a new task of Visual Question Rewriting(VQR) task is introduced to explore how visual information can be used to improve the new questions. A data set containing around 4K bland questions, attractive questions and images triples is collected. We developed some baseline sequence to sequence models and more advanced transformer based models, which take a bland question and a related image as input and output a rewritten question that is expected to be more attractive. Offline experiments and mechanical Turk based evaluations show that it is possible to rewrite bland questions in a more detailed and attractive way to increase the response rate, and images can be helpful.
summary: When a human asks questions online, or when a conversational virtual agent asks human questions, questions triggering emotions or with details might more likely to get responses or answers. we explore how to automatically rewrite natural language questions to improve the response rate from people. Offline experiments and mechanical Turk based evaluations show that it is possible to rewrite bland questions in a more detailed and attractive way to increase the response rate, and images can be helpful.
abstract_zh: 当人们在线提问时，或者当会话虚拟代理询问人类问题时，引发情绪或带有细节的问题可能更有可能得到回应或答案。我们探索如何自动重写自然语言问题以提高人们的回答率。特别是，引入了视觉问题重写（VQR）任务的新任务，以探索如何使用视觉信息来改进新问题。收集了包含大约 4K 乏味问题、有吸引力问题和图像三元组的数据集。我们开发了一些基线序列到序列模型和更先进的基于变压器的模型，它们以平淡的问题和相关图像作为输入，并输出重写的问题，预计会更有吸引力。离线实验和基于 Mechanical Turk 的评估表明，可以以更详细和更有吸引力的方式重写乏味的问题，以提高响应率，并且图像可能会有所帮助。

AI.tldr: 提出视觉问题重写任务，利用视觉信息自动重写问题以提高人类回答率
AI.motivation: 普通问题可能缺乏吸引力，导致低响应率，需通过重写使其更详细和吸引人以提高回答率
AI.method: 构建包含普通问题、吸引人问题和图像的数据集，采用序列到序列和Transformer模型，结合图像信息生成更吸引人的问题
AI.result: 实验表明，通过视觉信息重写的问题能有效提高响应率，图像辅助显著提升效果
AI.conclusion: 视觉问题重写可行，图像信息有效提升问题吸引力，未来可优化模型和扩展应用场景

title: Using Social Media Background to Improve Cold-start Recommendation Deep Models
title_zh: 利用社交媒体背景改进冷启动推荐深度模型
abstract: In recommender systems, a cold-start problem occurs when there is no past interaction record associated with the user or item. Typical solutions to the cold-start problem make use of contextual information, such as user demographic attributes or product descriptions. A group of works have shown that social media background can help predicting temporal phenomenons such as product sales and stock price movements. In this work, our goal is to investigate whether social media background can be used as extra contextual information to improve recommendation models. Based on an existing deep neural network model, we proposed a method to represent temporal social media background as embeddings and fuse them as an extra component in the model. We conduct experimental evaluations on a real-world e-commerce dataset and a Twitter dataset. The results show that our method of fusing social media background with the existing model does generally improve recommendation performance. In some cases the recommendation accuracy measured by hit-rate@K doubles after fusing with social media background. Our findings can be beneficial for future recommender system designs that consider complex temporal information representing social interests.

Our findings can be beneficial for future recommender system designs that consider complex temporal information representing social interests.
abstract_zh: 在推荐系统中，当没有与用户或项目关联的过去交互记录时，就会出现冷启动问题。冷启动问题的典型解决方案利用上下文信息，例如用户人口统计属性或产品描述。一组研究表明，社交媒体背景可以帮助预测产品销售和股价走势等时间现象。在这项工作中，我们的目标是调查社交媒体背景是否可以用作额外的上下文信息来改进推荐模型。基于现有的深度神经网络模型，我们提出了一种将时间社交媒体背景表示为嵌入并将它们融合为模型中的额外组件的方法。我们对现实世界的电子商务数据集和 Twitter 数据集进行实验评估。结果表明，我们将社交媒体背景与现有模型融合的方法确实普遍提高了推荐性能。在某些情况下，通过hit-rate@K衡量的推荐准确度在与社交媒体背景融合后会翻倍。我们的研究结果对于考虑代表社会兴趣的复杂时间信息的未来推荐系统设计可能是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用社交媒体背景信息改进推荐系统中的冷启动问题。
AI.motivation: 传统冷启动推荐依赖静态上下文信息，而社交媒体能提供动态时间序列数据，可能提升预测效果。
AI.method: 基于深度神经网络模型，将社交媒体背景转化为嵌入向量并与原有模型融合。
AI.result: 实验显示融合社交媒体后推荐准确率在部分场景下提升100%，效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 社交媒体时间信息可有效增强推荐模型，为复杂时序场景的推荐系统设计提供新思路。

title: X-volution: On the unification of convolution and self-attention
title_zh: X-volution：关于卷积和自注意力的统一
abstract: Convolution and self-attention are acting as two fundamental building blocks in deep neural networks, where the former extracts local image features in a linear way while the latter non-locally encodes high-order contextual relationships. Though essentially complementary to each other, i.e., first-/high-order, stat-of-the-art architectures, i.e., CNNs or transformers lack a principled way to simultaneously apply both operations in a single computational module, due to their heterogeneous computing pattern and excessive burden of global dot-product for visual tasks. In this work, we theoretically derive a global self-attention approximation scheme, which approximates a self-attention via the convolution operation on transformed features. Based on the approximated scheme, we establish a multi-branch elementary module composed of both convolution and self-attention operation, capable of unifying both local and non-local feature interaction. Importantly, once trained, this multi-branch module could be conditionally converted into a single standard convolution operation via structural re-parameterization, rendering a pure convolution styled operator named X-volution, ready to be plugged into any modern networks as an atomic operation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed X-volution, achieves highly competitive visual understanding improvements (+1.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet classification, +1.7 box AP and +1.5 mask AP on COCO detection and segmentation).

abstract_zh: 卷积和自注意力是深度神经网络中的两个基本构建块，前者以线性方式提取局部图像特征，而后者对高阶上下文关系进行非局部编码。尽管本质上是相互补充的，即一阶/高阶、最先进的架构，即 CNN 或 Transformer，但由于它们的异构计算模式和视觉任务的全局点积负担过重，缺乏在单个计算模块中同时应用这两种操作的原则方法。在这项工作中，我们从理论上推导了一种全局自注意力近似方案，该方案通过对变换后的特征进行卷积运算来近似自注意力。基于近似方案，我们建立了一个由卷积和自注意力操作组成的多分支基本模块，能够统一局部和非局部特征交互。重要的是，一旦经过训练，这个多分支模块可以通过结构重新参数化有条件地转换为单个标准卷积运算，从而呈现一个名为 X-volution 的纯卷积样式运算符，准备好作为原子操作插入到任何现代网络中。大量实验表明，所提出的 X-volution 实现了极具竞争力的视觉理解改进（ImageNet 分类上 +1.2% top-1 准确率，COCO 检测和分割上 +1.7 框 AP 和 +1.5 掩模 AP）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X-volution，通过理论推导将卷积与自注意力机制统一为单一计算模块，实现局部与非局部特征交互的融合。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer分别擅长局部特征提取与全局关系建模，但现有架构缺乏有效融合两者的方法，导致计算效率与性能受限。

search_text: X-volution: On the unification of convolution and self-attention X-volution：关于卷积和自注意力的统一 Convolution and self-attention are acting as two fundamental building blocks in deep neural networks, where the former extracts local image features in a linear way while the latter non-locally encodes high-order contextual relationships. Though essentially complementary to each other, i.e., first-/high-order, stat-of-the-art architectures, i.e., CNNs or transformers lack a principled way to simultaneously apply both operations in a single computational module, due to their heterogeneous computing pattern and excessive burden of global dot-product for visual tasks. In this work, we theoretically derive a global self-attention approximation scheme, which approximates a self-attention via the convolution operation on transformed features. Based on the approximated scheme, we establish a multi-branch elementary module composed of both convolution and self-attention operation, capable of unifying both local and non-local feature interaction. Importantly, once trained, this multi-branch module could be conditionally converted into a single standard convolution operation via structural re-parameterization, rendering a pure convolution styled operator named X-volution, ready to be plugged into any modern networks as an atomic operation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed X-volution, achieves highly competitive visual understanding improvements (+1.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet classification, +1.7 box AP and +1.5 mask AP on COCO detection and segmentation). 卷积和自注意力是深度神经网络中的两个基本构建块，前者以线性方式提取局部图像特征，而后者对高阶上下文关系进行非局部编码。尽管本质上是相互补充的，即一阶/高阶、最先进的架构，即 CNN 或 Transformer，但由于它们的异构计算模式和视觉任务的全局点积负担过重，缺乏在单个计算模块中同时应用这两种操作的原则方法。在这项工作中，我们从理论上推导了一种全局自注意力近似方案，该方案通过对变换后的特征进行卷积运算来近似自注意力。基于近似方案，我们建立了一个由卷积和自注意力操作组成的多分支基本模块，能够统一局部和非局部特征交互。重要的是，一旦经过训练，这个多分支模块可以通过结构重新参数化有条件地转换为单个标准卷积运算，从而呈现一个名为 X-volution 的纯卷积样式运算符，准备好作为原子操作插入到任何现代网络中。大量实验表明，所提出的 X-volution 实现了极具竞争力的视觉理解改进（ImageNet 分类上 +1.2% top-1 准确率，COCO 检测和分割上 +1.7 框 AP 和 +1.5 掩模 AP）。 本文提出X-volution，通过理论推导将卷积与自注意力机制统一为单一计算模块，实现局部与非局部特征交互的融合。 Xuanhong Chen,Hang Wang,Bingbing Ni cs.CV

authors_text: Vainavi Viswanath,Jennifer Grannen,Priya Sundaresan,Brijen Thananjeyan,Ashwin Balakrishna,Ellen Novoseller,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Michael Laskey,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Ken Goldberg
title: Disentangling Dense Multi-Cable Knots
abstract: Disentangling two or more cables requires many steps to remove crossings between and within cables. We formalize the problem of disentangling multiple cables and present an algorithm, Iterative Reduction Of Non-planar Multiple cAble kNots (IRON-MAN), that outputs robot actions to remove crossings from multi-cable knotted structures. We instantiate this algorithm with a learned perception system, inspired by prior work in single-cable untying that given an image input, can disentangle two-cable twists, three-cable braids, and knots of two or three cables, such as overhand, square, carrick bend, sheet bend, crown, and fisherman's knots. IRON-MAN keeps track of task-relevant keypoints corresponding to target cable endpoints and crossings and iteratively disentangles the cables by identifying and undoing crossings that are critical to knot structure. Using a da Vinci surgical robot, we experimentally evaluate the effectiveness of IRON-MAN on untangling multi-cable knots of types that appear in the training data, as well as generalizing to novel classes of multi-cable knots. Results suggest that IRON-MAN is effective in disentangling knots involving up to three cables with 80.5% success and generalizing to knot types that are not present during training, with cables of both distinct or identical colors.

abstract_zh: 解开两条或多条电缆需要执行许多步骤来消除电缆之间和内部的交叉点。我们形式化了解开多根电缆的问题，并提出了一种算法，即非平面多电缆结的迭代减少（IRON-MAN），该算法输出机器人动作以消除多电缆打结结构中的交叉。我们用学习感知系统实例化了该算法，受到先前单缆解开工作的启发，在给定图像输入的情况下，可以解开两根电缆的扭结、三根电缆的辫子以及两根或三根电缆的结，例如反手结、方形结、卡里克结、片状弯曲、冠形结和渔夫结。 IRON-MAN 跟踪与目标电缆端点和交叉点相对应的任务相关关键点，并通过识别和解开对结结构至关重要的交叉点来迭代地解开电缆。使用达芬奇手术机器人，我们通过实验评估了 IRON-MAN 在解开训练数据中出现的多电缆结类型以及推广到新型多电缆结方面的有效性。结果表明，IRON-MAN 可以有效解开涉及最多三根缆绳的结，成功率达 80.5%，并且可以推广到训练期间不存在的结类型（缆绳颜色不同或相同）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IRON-MAN的算法，用于解决多电缆打结问题，并通过机器人实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 多电缆打结问题在手术机器人等应用场景中具有挑战性，需要一种系统的方法来识别和消除打结结构中的交叉点。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种迭代算法IRON-MAN，结合学习感知系统，通过识别和消除关键交叉点逐步解开多电缆打结结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，IRON-MAN在解开最多三根电缆的打结结构时成功率高达80.5%，并且能够推广到训练数据中未出现的新类型打结。
AI.conclusion: IRON-MAN算法在解开多电缆打结结构方面表现出良好的效果和泛化能力，适用于多种电缆颜色和打结类型。

title: Knowing the No-match: Entity Alignment with Dangling Cases
title_zh: 了解不匹配：实体与悬空案例的对齐
abstract: This paper studies a new problem setting of entity alignment for knowledge graphs (KGs). Since KGs possess different sets of entities, there could be entities that cannot find alignment across them, leading to the problem of dangling entities. As the first attempt to this problem, we construct a new dataset and design a multi-task learning framework for both entity alignment and dangling entity detection. The framework can opt to abstain from predicting alignment for the detected dangling entities. We propose three techniques for dangling entity detection that are based on the distribution of nearest-neighbor distances, i.e., nearest neighbor classification, marginal ranking and background ranking. After detecting and removing dangling entities, an incorporated entity alignment model in our framework can provide more robust alignment for remaining entities. Comprehensive experiments and analyses demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework. We further discover that the dangling entity detection module can, in turn, improve alignment learning and the final performance. The contributed resource is publicly available to foster further research.

abstract_zh: 本文研究了知识图（KG）实体对齐的新问题设置。由于知识图谱拥有不同的实体集，因此可能存在无法在它们之间找到对齐的实体，从而导致悬空实体的问题。作为解决这个问题的第一次尝试，我们构建了一个新的数据集，并设计了一个用于实体对齐和悬挂实体检测的多任务学习框架。该框架可以选择放弃预测检测到的悬空实体的对齐。我们提出了三种基于最近邻距离分布的悬挂实体检测技术，即最近邻分类、边缘排序和背景排序。在检测和删除悬挂实体后，我们框架中合并的实体对齐模型可以为剩余实体提供更强大的对齐。综合实验和分析证明了我们框架的有效性。我们进一步发现悬挂实体检测模块可以反过来提高对齐学习和最终性能。贡献的资源是公开的，以促进进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究知识图谱中实体对齐的新问题设置，针对无法对齐的悬空实体提出多任务学习框架。
AI.motivation: 现有实体对齐方法忽略悬空实体（无法跨图谱对齐的实体）导致对齐效果下降，需解决该问题以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建新数据集，设计多任务框架联合处理实体对齐与悬空检测，提出基于最近邻距离分布的三种检测技术（分类/边缘排序/背景排序）。
AI.result: 实验验证框架有效性，悬空检测模块反哺对齐学习，公开数据集促进后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 提出首个悬空实体处理框架，通过检测模块提升对齐性能，资源公开推动领域发展。

ai_content.method: 构建新数据集，设计多任务框架联合处理实体对齐与悬空检测，提出基于最近邻距离分布的三种检测技术（分类/边缘排序/背景排序）。
ai_content.result: 实验验证框架有效性，悬空检测模块反哺对齐学习，公开数据集促进后续研究。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出首个悬空实体处理框架，通过检测模块提升对齐性能，资源公开推动领域发展。

search_text: Knowing the No-match: Entity Alignment with Dangling Cases 了解不匹配：实体与悬空案例的对齐 This paper studies a new problem setting of entity alignment for knowledge graphs (KGs). Since KGs possess different sets of entities, there could be entities that cannot find alignment across them, leading to the problem of dangling entities. As the first attempt to this problem, we construct a new dataset and design a multi-task learning framework for both entity alignment and dangling entity detection. The framework can opt to abstain from predicting alignment for the detected dangling entities. We propose three techniques for dangling entity detection that are based on the distribution of nearest-neighbor distances, i.e., nearest neighbor classification, marginal ranking and background ranking. After detecting and removing dangling entities, an incorporated entity alignment model in our framework can provide more robust alignment for remaining entities. Comprehensive experiments and analyses demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework. We further discover that the dangling entity detection module can, in turn, improve alignment learning and the final performance. The contributed resource is publicly available to foster further research. 本文研究了知识图（KG）实体对齐的新问题设置。由于知识图谱拥有不同的实体集，因此可能存在无法在它们之间找到对齐的实体，从而导致悬空实体的问题。作为解决这个问题的第一次尝试，我们构建了一个新的数据集，并设计了一个用于实体对齐和悬挂实体检测的多任务学习框架。该框架可以选择放弃预测检测到的悬空实体的对齐。我们提出了三种基于最近邻距离分布的悬挂实体检测技术，即最近邻分类、边缘排序和背景排序。在检测和删除悬挂实体后，我们框架中合并的实体对齐模型可以为剩余实体提供更强大的对齐。综合实验和分析证明了我们框架的有效性。我们进一步发现悬挂实体检测模块可以反过来提高对齐学习和最终性能。贡献的资源是公开的，以促进进一步的研究。 本文研究知识图谱中实体对齐的新问题设置，针对无法对齐的悬空实体提出多任务学习框架。 Zequn Sun,Muhao Chen,Wei Hu cs.CL,cs.AI
